description: §38.13.2 — a `watches=events key=label` channel over a PK-less table supplies the delta key via the `key=<column>` override, so W-CHANNEL-WATCHES-NO-PK does NOT fire (paired positive-companion to channel-watches-no-pk). The override resolves `label` as the Deleted key type.
rationale: §38.13.2: an explicit `key=<column>` attribute on the `<channel>` overrides the id-field PK convention. With `key=label` naming a real column, the feed can key its Deleted deltas, so W-CHANNEL-WATCHES-NO-PK stays silent.
